def solve(prices, strategy, k)
  original_profit = 0
  prices.each_with_index do |p, i|
    original_profit += strategy[i] * p
  end

  n = prices.length
  m = k / 2

  A = Array.new(n) { |i| -strategy[i] * prices[i] }
  B = Array.new(n) { |i| (1 - strategy[i]) * prices[i] }

  left_sums = []
  current_sum = 0
  for i in 0...m
    current_sum += A[i]
  end
  left_sums << current_sum

  for i in 1..(n - m)
    current_sum = current_sum - A[i-1] + A[i + m - 1]
    left_sums << current_sum
  end

  right_sums = []
  current_sum = 0
  for i in 0...m
    current_sum += B[i]
  end
  right_sums << current_sum

  for i in 1..(n - m)
    current_sum = current_sum - B[i-1] + B[i + m - 1]
    right_sums << current_sum
  end

  max_delta = 0
  for i in 0..(n - k)
    delta = left_sums[i] + right_sums[i + m]
    max_delta = [max_delta, delta].max
  end

  original_profit + max_delta
end

def solve(prices, strategy, k)
  original_profit = 0
  prices.each_with_index do |p, i|
    original_profit += strategy[i] * p
  end

  n = prices.length
  m = k / 2

  end

  current_sum = 0

  end
  right_sums << current_sum

  for i in 1..(n - m)
    current_sum = current_sum - B[i-1] + B[i + m - 1]
    right_sums << current_sum
  end

  max_delta = 0
  for i in 0..(n - k)
    delta = left_sums[i] + right_sums[i + m]
    max_delta = [max_delta, delta].max
  end

  original_profit + max_delta
end

def solve(prices, strategy, k)
  original_profit = 0
  prices.each_with_index do |p, i|
    original_profit += strategy[i] * p
  end

  n = prices.length
  m = k / 2

  A = Array.new(n) { |i| -strategy[i] * prices[i] }
  B = Array.new(n) { |i| (1 - strategy[i]) * prices[i] }

  left_sums = []
  current_sum = 0
  for i in 0...m

  end

  for i in 1..(n - m)

    left_sums << current_sum
  end

  right_sums = []
  current_sum = 0
  for i in 0...m
    current_sum += B[i]
  end
  right_sums << current_sum

  for i in 1..(n - m)
    current_sum = current_sum - B[i-1] + B[i + m - 1]
    right_sums << current_sum
  end

  max_delta = 0
  for i in 0..(n - k)
    delta = left_sums[i] + right_sums[i + m]
    max_delta = [max_delta, delta].max
  end

  original_profit + max_delta
end

  # compute right_sums: sliding window sum of B with window size m

  current_sum = 0

    current_sum += B[i]
  end

    current_sum = current_sum - B[i-1] + B[i + m -1]
    right_sums << current_sum
  end

  # find the maximum delta

  end

end
